metodos.codigoOriginal:
lcSep = Set([Separator])
lcPto = Set([Point])
Set Point To [,]
Set Separator To [.]

Do Case
	case thisform.optPenPag.value=1
		report form SigReCr11 to printer noconsole

	Case (ThisForm.optTipo.Value = 1)
		If (ThisForm.optQuebras.Value = 1)
			report form SigReCr1 to printer noconsole
		Else 
			report form SigReCr2 to printer noconsole
		EndIf

	Case (ThisForm.optTipo.Value = 2)
		report form SigReCr3 to printer noconsole

	Otherwise 
		report form SigReCr4 to printer noconsole
EndCase

Private pDtI,pDtF
LOCAL lcMoe, lnPenPag
lcMoe = 'AU'
lnCot1 = fBuscarCotacao(lcMoe, DATE())				&& mena - 16/11/2016 - pega a cotaçăo da data do recebimento	Date()) 


ldDtI     = ThisForm.get_dt_inicial.Value
ldDtF     = ThisForm.get_dt_final.Value

lcDsMoeda = ThisForm.get_ds_moeda.Value

lcPto = Set([Point])
Set Point To [,]
Set Separator To [.]

Do Case
	case thisform.optPenPag.value=1
		report form SigReCr11 preview NoConsole

	Case (ThisForm.optTipo.Value = 1)
		If (ThisForm.optQuebras.Value = 1)
			report form SigReCr1 preview NoConsole
		Else
			If ThisForm.optQuebras.Value = 2
				report form SigReCr2 preview NoConsole
			Else
				report form SigReCr6 preview NoConsole
			Endif
		EndIf

	Case (ThisForm.optTipo.Value = 2)
		report form SigReCr3 prev... [TRUNCADO]

If !IsEmpty(this.value)
	fAcessoContab(Usuar,'D',this.value,This.Parent.get_Cd_Grestoque,This)
Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Grestoque.value = ''
	This.Parent.get_Cd_Grestoque.refresh
endif
return(.t.)

If !IsEmpty(this.value)
	fAcessoContab(Usuar,'C',this.value,This,This.Parent.get_Ds_Grestoque)
Else
	This.Parent.get_Ds_Grestoque.value = ''
	This.Parent.get_Ds_Grestoque.refresh
endif
return(.t.)

grupo = ThisForm.get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value
If !IsEmpty(this.value)
	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,grupo,'D',this.value,This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque,This)
		Messagebox('Acesso Negado !!',0+48,'')
		This.Value=''
		This.Refresh
		This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque.Value = ''
		This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque.Refresh
		return 0 
	Endif
Else
	This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque.Value = ''
	This.Parent.get_Cd_estoque.Refresh
	return(.t.)
EndIf

grupo = ThisForm.get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value
If !IsEmpty(this.value)

		This.Value=''
		This.Refresh
		This.Parent.get_Ds_estoque.Value = ''
		This.Parent.get_Ds_estoque.Refresh
		return 0 
	Endif
Else
	This.Parent.get_Ds_estoque.Value = ''
	This.Parent.get_Ds_estoque.Refresh
	return(.t.)
EndIf

if IsEmpty(ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.Value)
	ThisForm.get_ds_moeda.Value = ''
	ThisForm.get_ds_moeda.refresh
	return(.t.)
endif

					   'crListaRemota','CMOES', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', 1000)

	loLista.mAddColuna('DMOES', '', 'Descriçăo',.T., 'DMOES')
	loLista.Show()
EndIf

	ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.Value=''

if IsEmpty(ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.Value)
	ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.Value=''
	ThisForm.get_cd_moeda.refresh
	return(.t.)
endif

loLista = CreateObject('fwbuscaext', ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn, 'SigCdMoe', ;
					   'crListaRemota','DMOES', This.Value, 'Seleçăo', 1000)
If Not loLista.plAchouRegistro

	loLista.Show()
EndIf

IF this.Value = 1
	thisform.optTipo.Value=1
	thisform.optQuebras.Value=1
	thisform.Refresh   
ENDIF

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: lcQrySigCdEmp = [Select cemps,razas From SigCdEmp Where cemps=']+_Empr+['] lcQrySigMvPar = [Select * From SigMvPar Where 1=0 ]
